attendant.body: Attendants on the lot to walk you through bays, swap bills, or just keep things tidy.
attendant.heading: Friendly faces, ready to help.

heading: Everything else **on the lot**.

houseRules.body: Help keep Spotless a clean, quiet & safe place to wash your car.

services.body: All wash bays take all major credit cards, ones, fives & quarters. The automatics also take tens. Tap and Apple Pay accepted too.
services.title: Payment, your way

services.body: Fragrance trees, blue shammy towels & Armor All pads — stocked on-site whenever you need them.
services.title: Vending machines

services.body: High-suction vacuums positioned around both lots. Drop a buck and clean out the cabin while your wax cures.
services.title: Vacuums on the lot

services.body: A surface gloss enhancer that beads water and leaves a deep shine. Available in **every bay** — automatic and self-serve. Apply before the spot-free rinse for best results.
services.title: Get glossy with **Durashield**.

services.body: Daily — every day of the week.
services.title: Wash hours

subhead: Vacuums, vending, attendants on duty, and a few house rules. Wash hours are 7AM–10PM daily — bays are always open, attendants keep set hours.
